name: openclaw-google-ads
description: Google Ads API integration for OpenClaw agents. Access campaigns, performance metrics, spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions via GAQL queries. Supports OAuth authentication and Manager Account (MCC) access.
author: Albert (@sebclawops)
security_note: This skill requires OAuth credentials for Google Ads API access. The authenticate.py script generates a refresh token and stores it in ~/.openclaw/credentials/ with chmod 600 permissions. Users should never commit credentials to version control.

architecture.design: Scripts for authentication, campaign queries, account summaries, and custom GAQL execution.
